backend/main.mo: Minimal Motoko canister with an empty actor.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing Tic-Tac-Toe related features, associated files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing prewritten summaries for many frontend source files including Tic-Tac-Toe and countdown features.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining light and dark theme CSS variables and global styling.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point mounting the app root and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component wrapping TicTacToeGame in AppShell with theming and toast support.
frontend/src/features/countdowns/Countdo: UI card component rendering an individual countdown with remaining time, notes, reminders, and actions.
Dashboard managing countdown list, notification permissions, reminders, and create/edit flows.
Form dialog for creating or editing countdowns with validation, reminders, and event metadata.
frontend/src/features/countdowns/eventTh: Defines event theme styles and a helper to retrieve a theme by event type.
frontend/src/features/countdowns/storage: Handles saving and loading countdowns and fired reminders to localStorage with basic validation.
frontend/src/features/countdowns/types.t: Declares TypeScript types for countdown events, reminders, and time-remaining calculations.
frontend/src/features/countdowns/useCoun: React hook for loading, storing, and updating countdown events with persistence.
frontend/src/features/countdowns/validat: Validates countdown fields and reminder settings, returning structured errors.
frontend/src/features/layout/AppShell.ts: Layout wrapper providing header, footer, and main content structure for the app.
frontend/src/features/notifications/brow: Shows a browser notification if permissions allow, with basic error handling.
frontend/src/features/notifications/useN: React hook to track and request browser notification permissions.
frontend/src/features/reminders/reminder: Provides logic for calculating reminder trigger times and determining when reminders should fire.
frontend/src/features/reminders/useRemin: React hook that checks and fires reminders, persists fired IDs, and shows toast/browser notifications.
frontend/src/features/storage/localStora: Utility for versioned localStorage read/write with validation and error handling.
frontend/src/features/tictactoe/gameLogi: Contains core Tic Tac Toe logic such as board initialization, move rules, and win detection.
frontend/src/features/tictactoe/TicTacTo: Renders the Tic Tac Toe grid and handles valid cell clicks.
Implements full Tic Tac Toe game flow including human/computer turns and status handling.
frontend/src/features/time/formatRemaini: Computes remaining time until a target date and provides short/long formatting helpers.
frontend/src/features/time/useNow.ts: React hook returning a periodically updated current timestamp.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor tied to the current identity and invalidates dependent queries when it changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context, managing login, logout, identity loading, and status tracking.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind base styles and a custom OKLCH color theme with light/dark modes and event-specific utility classes.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Exports a helper function that merges class names using clsx and tailwind-merge.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with React Query and Internet Identity providers and loads global styles.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind with custom colors, themes, plugins, and extended utilities using OKLCH variables.
project_state.json: Describes the project state and feature requirements for converting a Python Tic-Tac-Toe game into a browser-based UI version.
